info.name: CaseXchange Public API
info.description:
The CaseXchange Public API enables law firms to integrate referral management directly into their own systems.

## Authentication
- Public endpoints require `X-API-Key` with a public API key (tiered format: `cxp_ro_...`, `cxp_std_...`, `cxp_full_...`).
- Key Management endpoints (`/api/v1/public-api-keys`) use internal auth. In Postman, run Login first and rely on session cookies.

## Access Tiers
- `READ_ONLY` — GET endpoints only
- `STANDARD` — READ_ONLY + create/update operations
- `FULL` — STANDARD + destructive and admin-grade operations

## Quick Start
1. Set `base_url` in the active environment (local: `http://localhost:3001`, production: `https://api.casexchange.com`).
2. Run **Login** to establish an authenticated internal session.
3. Run **Create Public API Key** to generate and auto-save `api_key`.
4. Use public endpoints under `{{public_api_url}}`.

## Response Format
Public API responses use envelope:
- Success: `{ data, meta, pagination? }`
- Error: `{ error, meta }`

item.name: Authentication Setup
item.description: Get a JWT token and create a public API key. Run these in order before using other requests.

request.description: Authenticate with the internal API to obtain a JWT token. The test script saves the token to the `jwt_token` environment variable automatically.

exec: // New auth flow is cookie-based. Keep jwt_token only if explicitly returned.
console.log('No accessToken in body (cookie-based login). Cleared jwt_token to avoid stale Bearer auth.');

request.description:
Creates a new public API key for the authenticated user's firm. The plaintext key is only returned once — the test script saves it to `api_key` automatically.

Tier options: `READ_ONLY`, `STANDARD`, `FULL`

exec: console.log('Saved api_key and key_id. Key prefix: ' + key.substring(0, 12) + '...');

item.name: Health
item.description: API health check — no authentication required.

request.description: Returns API health status and rate limit configuration. No API key required.

item.name: Reference Data
item.description: Case types, jurisdictions, and counties. All endpoints require at minimum READ_ONLY tier.

request.description: Returns all active case types available for creating referrals. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Returns all jurisdictions (US states and territories) supported by the platform. Tier: READ_ONLY.

query.description: Comma-separated jurisdiction codes to filter by (optional)

request.description: Returns counties, optionally filtered by one or more jurisdiction codes (comma-separated). Tier: READ_ONLY.

Returns all active custom field definitions for a given case type, including field type, display order, required flag, enum options, and validation rules.

Use case type IDs from the List Case Types endpoint.

Tier: READ_ONLY

item.name: Firms
item.description: Firm directory and profile management.

request.description: Returns a directory of all active firms on the platform. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Returns the firm associated with the API key making the request. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Returns a single firm by its UUID. Set `firm_id` in the environment or run Get Firm Directory first. Tier: READ_ONLY.

query.description: Filter by source: 'network', 'directory', or omit for both
Case-insensitive partial match on firm name

request.description: Returns firms available for referrals from the requesting firm's private network and/or the public directory. Includes resolved case type display names and referral instructions. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Updates editable fields on the API key's own firm. All body fields are optional. Tier: FULL.

item.name: Sent Cases
item.description: Cases created and sent by your firm (sender perspective). These endpoints provide a sender-centric view with flexible ID resolution (UUID, reference number, or Salesforce record ID).

query.description: Search by reference number or receiving firm name

request.description:
Returns a paginated list of cases owned by your firm (sender perspective). Lean response: id, referenceNumber, salesforceId, receivingFirmName, receivingFirmId, status, closingStatus, updatedAt.

Supports flexible ID lookup (UUID, reference number, or Salesforce record ID).

Tier: READ_ONLY

exec: console.log('Saved first sent case ID: ' + json.data[0].id);

request.description:
Returns full detail for a sent case, including all referrals. Accepts UUID, reference number, or Salesforce record ID.

Response includes base case fields, most recent referral fields (flattened), and a referrals array with per-referral summaries.

Tier: READ_ONLY

Returns available next status transitions from the sender's perspective for the most recent referral.

Tier: READ_ONLY

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Smith v. Jones - Personal Injury",
  "description": "Auto accident case involving rear-end collision",
  "caseType": "Personal Injury",
  "jurisdiction": "NY",
  "county": "New York",
  "clientFirstName": "John",
  "clientLastName": "Smith",
  "clientPhone": "555-987-6543",
  "clientDateOfBirth": "1985-06-15",
  "incidentDate": "2025-11-01",
  "tier": 3,
  "source": "Website Lead",
  "notes": "Client sustained whiplash injuries. Police report filed.",
  "isRetainerSigned": false,
  "salesforceId": "006xxxxxxxxxxxx",
  "salesforceObjectType": "Opportunity",
  "customFields": [
    {
      "fieldId": "{{custom_field_id}}",
      "value": "Example value"
    }
  ]
}

request.description:
Creates a new case. Required fields: title, caseType, jurisdiction, clientFirstName, clientLastName.

If referentFirmId is included, the case is sent immediately (SENT status). Otherwise, it starts as DRAFT.

Optionally include customFields to set case-type-specific custom field values at creation time.

Tier: STANDARD

exec: console.log('Saved new sent case ID: ' + json.data.id);

request.description:
Sends a DRAFT case to a receiving firm, or creates a new referral on an existing base case (re-refer).

Tier: STANDARD

Updates sender-editable fields on a sent case. Supports title, description, caseType, jurisdiction, client info, notes, source, resolution fields, and customFields.

Accepts UUID, reference number, or Salesforce record ID.

Tier: STANDARD

item.name: Documents
item.description: Document upload, download, and management for cases.

request.description: Returns all documents attached to the specified case. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Returns a short-lived pre-signed S3 URL for downloading the specified document. Set `document_id` in the environment or run List Documents first. Tier: READ_ONLY.

formdata.description: File to upload (max 50 MB). Select a file from your local machine.

request.description: Uploads a file and attaches it to the specified case (multipart/form-data). Max file size 50 MB. Tier: STANDARD.
Permanently deletes the specified document from the case and S3. Returns 204 No Content on success. Tier: FULL.

item.name: Users
item.description: User management within the caller's firm.

request.description: Returns all users belonging to the API key's own firm. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Invites a new user to the caller's firm. Required fields: email, firstName, lastName, role. Valid roles: ADMIN, ACCOUNT_MANAGER, FIRM_ADMIN, MEMBER, VIEWER. Tier: FULL.
Updates a user in the caller's firm. All body fields are optional: firstName, lastName, email, role, isActive. Email must be unique. Tier: FULL.
Deactivates a user in the caller's firm. Sets isActive to false, clears security tokens, and revokes all sessions. Tier: FULL.

item.name: Routing Rules
item.description: Referral routing rules for automatic case assignment.

request.description: Returns the referral routing rules configured for the caller's firm. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Creates a new referral routing rule for the firm. Required fields: name, caseTypeIds (at least one valid case type UUID), assignments. Tier: FULL.
Updates an existing routing rule. All body fields are optional. Tier: FULL.
Deletes a routing rule. Returns 204 No Content on success. Tier: FULL.

item.name: Analytics
item.description: Dashboard and case analytics for the caller's firm.

request.description: Returns high-level referral analytics for the caller's firm. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Returns case-level analytics with optional date range filtering. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Returns homepage analytics for the caller's firm. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Returns analytics grouped by case status for the caller's firm. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Returns analytics for cases received by the caller's firm. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Returns analytics for cases sent by the caller's firm. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Returns revenue analytics for cases received by the caller's firm. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Returns revenue analytics for cases sent by the caller's firm. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Returns referral analytics for the caller's firm. Tier: READ_ONLY.

item.name: Export
item.description: Export analytics and case data.

request.description: Exports all analytics data for the caller's firm. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Exports analytics data for a specific category (e.g. received) for the caller's firm. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Exports case data as an XLSX file for the caller's firm. Tier: READ_ONLY.

item.name: Notifications
item.description: Notification preferences and email address management.

request.description: Returns the notification preferences for the caller's firm. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Updates the notification preferences for the caller's firm. Tier: FULL.
Returns all notification email addresses configured for the caller's firm. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Adds an email address to the firm's notification list. Required field: email. Tier: FULL.

item.name: Medical Referrals
item.description: Medical provider referrals linked to cases.

request.description: Returns all medical referrals linked to the caller's cases. Tier: READ_ONLY.

exec: console.log('Saved first medical referral ID: ' + json.data[0].id);

request.description: Returns a single medical referral by UUID. Set `medical_referral_id` in the environment or run List Medical Referrals first. Tier: READ_ONLY.

body.raw:
{
  "baseCaseId": "{{case_id}}",
  "clientFirstName": "Jane",
  "clientLastName": "Doe",
  "clientEmail": "jane.doe@example.com",
  "clientPhone": "555-123-4567",
  "providerId": "{{firm_id}}",
  "notes": "Medical referral created via API",
  "dateOfInjury": "2026-01-15",
  "injuryDescription": "Knee injury from auto accident"
}

request.description: Creates a new medical referral. Required fields: clientFirstName, clientLastName. Note: this model is evolving. Tier: STANDARD.
Updates an existing medical referral. All body fields are optional. Tier: STANDARD.

item.name: Bulk Import
item.description: Bulk case import and update via CSV file upload. Both endpoints require FULL tier.

formdata.description: CSV file to import (max 20 MB). Select a CSV file from your local machine.

request.description: Creates or upserts cases from a CSV file upload. Max file size 20 MB. Returns a summary with created, updated, skipped counts and any per-row errors. Tier: FULL.

formdata.description: CSV file with updates (max 20 MB). Only existing cases are affected — no new records created.

request.description:
Updates existing cases from a CSV file. Only existing cases are affected — no new records are created. Max file size 20 MB. Tier: FULL.

Note: The 'notes' field has field-level RBAC — only the receiving (referent) firm can update it. The referring firm's requests to update 'notes' will be rejected per-row.

item.name: Key Management (Internal API)
item.description: Manage public API keys via the internal API. These endpoints use Bearer JWT authentication (not X-API-Key). Firm admins use these to create, list, inspect usage, and revoke keys.

request.description: Returns all public API keys for the authenticated user's firm. Uses JWT Bearer authentication.
Creates a new public API key. The plaintext key (`plainKey`) is only returned in this response — store it securely. Valid tiers: READ_ONLY, STANDARD, FULL.

exec: console.log('Saved api_key and key_id. Key prefix: ' + key.substring(0, 12) + '...');

request.description: Returns usage statistics for a specific public API key. Set `key_id` in the environment (the key's UUID, not the plaintext key value).
Permanently revokes a public API key. All subsequent requests using the revoked key will return 401. This action cannot be undone.

item.name: Referrals
item.description: Referral CRUD and lifecycle actions. All endpoints use the referral UUID directly at /referrals/:id.

query.description: Filter by CaseStatus enum value (e.g. sent, received, investigating)

request.description: List all referrals for a base case. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Returns a single referral by UUID. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Updates mutable fields on a referral (notes, phase, financial estimates, customFields, etc.). Tier: STANDARD. Note: only the referent firm can update notes.
Sends a DRAFT referral to the specified receiving firm, transitioning it to SENT. Tier: STANDARD. Only the referring firm may call this action.
Acknowledges a SENT referral, transitioning it to RECEIVED. Tier: STANDARD. Only the receiving (referent) firm may call this action.
Begins investigation on a RECEIVED referral, transitioning it to INVESTIGATING. Tier: STANDARD. Only the receiving firm may call this action.
Marks a referral as signed by the client, transitioning it to SIGNED. Tier: STANDARD. Only the receiving firm may call this action.
Transitions a SIGNED referral to IN_LITIGATION. Tier: STANDARD. Only the receiving firm may call this action.
Closes a referral with a closing status (won_settled, lost, etc.). Tier: FULL. Only the receiving firm may call this action.
Rejects an incoming referral. Tier: STANDARD. Only the receiving firm may call this action.
Withdraws a sent referral back to the referring firm. Tier: STANDARD. Only the referring firm may call this action.
Deletes a DRAFT referral. Only the referring firm may delete. Tier: FULL.
Returns all historical status transitions for a referral. Tier: READ_ONLY.

item.name: Status Updates
item.description: Status update lookups and listings. All endpoints require at minimum READ_ONLY tier.

query.description: The case or referral ID to look up status updates for

request.description: Returns status updates for a specific case or referral identified by the provided ID. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Returns all status updates accessible to the API key's firm, paginated. Tier: READ_ONLY.

item.name: Messages
item.description: Send messages on referrals. Requires at minimum STANDARD tier.

request.description: Sends a message on a referral identified by the provided ID. Tier: STANDARD.

item.name: Routing Evaluation
item.description: Evaluate routing rules to determine which firms a case would be routed to.

query.description: Case type name to evaluate routing rules for
Jurisdiction code to evaluate routing rules for
Optional attempt number for re-referral evaluation

request.description: Evaluates routing rules for the given case type and jurisdiction, returning the ranked list of firms that would receive the referral. Tier: READ_ONLY.

query.description: Referral UUID to evaluate re-referral routing for

request.description: Evaluates which firms would receive a re-referral for an existing case, taking into account previous routing attempts. Tier: READ_ONLY.

item.name: Network
item.description: Manage the firm's private referral network — outbound and inbound relationships with partner firms.

request.description: Returns the outbound network relationship between the caller's firm and the specified target firm. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Returns the inbound network relationship between the specified target firm and the caller's firm. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Returns all pending inbound network relationship requests awaiting the caller's firm's acceptance. Tier: READ_ONLY.
Creates or fully replaces the outbound network relationship with the specified target firm. Tier: FULL.
Partially updates the outbound network relationship with the specified target firm. Only provided fields are updated. Tier: STANDARD.
Partially updates the inbound network relationship from the specified target firm — e.g., accepting a pending request or updating referral instructions. Tier: STANDARD.

item.name: Salesforce Tokens
item.description: Manage Salesforce integration tokens for simplified authentication. These endpoints use JWT Bearer auth (from the Login step), not the public API key.

request.description:
Creates a new Salesforce integration token. The plaintext token (cxsf_...) is only returned once — store it securely.

Required fields: name
Optional: salesforceConnectionId (UUID of an existing Salesforce connection)
Returns all Salesforce integration tokens for the authenticated user's firm. Token values are not included — only metadata (prefix, name, status, etc.).
Revokes the current token value and generates a new one. The old token is immediately invalidated. The new plaintext token is returned — store it securely.

exec: console.log('Updated sf_token with rotated value: ' + json.data.plainToken.substring(0, 12) + '...');

request.description: Permanently deletes (revokes) a Salesforce integration token. The token is immediately invalidated and cannot be recovered. Returns 204 No Content on success.

variable.description: Internal API base URL (for auth and key management)
